backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no logic implemented.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: replacing the quesadilla menu card image and adding a catchy slogan to the site header, with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one- to two-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key contents.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Header, HeroSection, MenuSection, CateringSection, ContactSection, and Footer into a single-page layout.
Catering section component displaying event offerings, a banner image, an included-items checklist, and a CTA button scrolling to the contact section, styled for the Phoenix, AZ market.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section displaying owner Jasmine Cota's profile, a clickable phone number, service area, and availability details inside a styled card.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, contact info for Jasmine Cota, copyright notice, and a 'Made with love in Phoenix, AZ' tagline.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with a tagline bar, logo, desktop nav links, and a mobile hamburger menu that hides on scroll-down and supports outside-click/escape dismissal.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, logo, tagline, main heading, and CTA buttons for exploring the menu and booking catering via phone.
frontend/src/components/MenuSection.tsx: Displays a grid of menu item cards (tacos, burritos, quesadillas, chips & salsa) with images, descriptions, ingredient details, badges, and optional protein choice selectors.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no backend queries, as the site is a static frontend.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollDirection.ts: Custom hook that tracks scroll direction (up/down/none), current scroll position, and whether the page is at the top, using requestAnimationFrame for performance.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers with a Mexican-inspired OKLCH color palette, dark mode variables, and custom utility classes for typography and gradients.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for a Mexican food website, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Dancing Script, Montserrat), a Mexican-inspired color palette (chili, sienna, gold, verde, cream), custom shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking', a Mexican food/quesadilla menu website, recording two pending features: replacing a quesadilla menu card image with a newly generated one and adding a catchy Mexican food slogan to the site header.
